sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49847" key="i)diokrasi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰδῐο-κρᾱσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n49847.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">peculiar temperament</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-συγκρασίαν</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
